2. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\app\Http\Controllers\AiController.php` - find line numbers for:

3. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\app\Services\TransferRequestService.php` - find line numbers for:

4. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\app\Http\Controllers\MailController.php` - find line numbers for:

5. `D:\project\info-gitlab\oa\oa-core\config\my_master_api.php` - find line numbers for:

Just read each file and report the line numbers. Quick search.
